ItacPersonItem.Notes: For his membership in the Accademia della Traccia, see A. R. Capoccia, `Guglielmini, Domenico`, in DBI. He was also member of scientific academies in Paris, London, Berlin, and of the Naturae Curiosorum. Professor of mathematics in Bologna and Padua ,and of medicine in Padua. Joined the Ricovrati in January 1710, according to Maggiolo (1983).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
